tool_args.label: Coney Island Yard Long-Term Flood Mitigation
tool_args.raw_text: The project will provide the Coney Island Yard Complex, the largest rapid transit yard in the world, with resilient systems and storm-surge flood protection.

payload.project_name: Coney Island Yard Long-Term Flood Mitigation
payload.description: Provide the Coney Island Yard Complex with resilient systems and storm-surge flood protection. Involves construction of 2.5 miles of perimeter wall, 4,200 LF of cable bridge, more than 20,000 LF of new drainage, 600 linear feet of new track and third rail, two new pump stations. Budget $514M. Original forecast substantial completion Sept 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Coney Island Yard Long-Term Flood Mitigation for NYCT C34836

warnings: project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: Clifton Shop (SIR)
tool_args.raw_text: This project is to fortify Staten Island's Clifton Shop and Yard infrastructure and equipment against heavy rainfall and/or storm surges.

payload.description: Fortify Staten Island's Clifton Shop and Yard infrastructure and equipment against heavy rainfall and/or storm surges. Construct a brand-new maintenance facility to replace existing obsolescent buildings. Budget $211.5M. Original forecast beneficial use Jul 2020, current Sept 2021. Project is 17 months behind schedule.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Clifton Shop for SIR C82004

warnings: project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: Rutgers Tube Rehabilitation
tool_args.raw_text: MTA C&D is repairing the damage caused by Superstorm Sandy to the Rutgers Tunnel, and fortifying it against future flooding.

payload.description: Repair damage caused by Superstorm Sandy to the Rutgers Tunnel, and fortify it against future flooding. Last of 11 MTA cross-river tunnels to be rehabbed. Design-Build project accelerated to 14 months. Includes station improvements at East Broadway. Budget $167M. Substantial completion Aug 2021.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Rutgers Tunnel for NYCT

warnings: project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: 207th Street Yard Flood Mitigation & Sewer Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: This project repairs damage to the 207 St Yard caused by Hurricane Sandy and fortifies it against future flooding events.

payload.project_name: 207th Street Yard Flood Mitigation and Sewer Replacement
payload.description: Repair damage to the 207 St Yard caused by Hurricane Sandy and fortify against future flooding. Six components: Perimeter Walls and Gates, Tunnel Portal, Traction Power Cable Replacement, Signals, Yard Track, Yard Switches. Budget $638M. Substantial completion Nov 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207 St Yard for NYCT

warnings: project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: Bus Radio System
tool_args.raw_text: The project involves implementing a new digital bus radio system for NYCT and MTA Bus.

payload.project_name: Bus Radio System (Replace Bus Radio System)
payload.description: Implement a new digital bus radio system for NYCT and MTA Bus. Includes constructing 35 new radio base station sites, retrofitting entire fleet of approx. 6,000 buses and non-revenue vehicles, furnishing new radio control and dispatch system in new Bus Command Center. Budget $293.8M. Original substantial completion Dec 2020, current Dec 2021.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Radio Project for NYCT W32366

warnings: project.operator is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Operator is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: operated_by.
project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: Harmon Shop Replacement Phase V Stage 2
tool_args.raw_text: Phase V Stage 2 of the Harmon Shop replacement is the final stage of a multi-phase program of capital improvements and upgrades at MNR's Croton-Harmon Shops and Yards.

payload.project_name: Harmon Shop Replacement Phase V Stage 2
payload.description: Final stage of multi-phase program of capital improvements at MNR's Croton-Harmon Shops and Yards. Demolition of remainder of Building 6 and construction of EMU Running Repair and Support Shop Facility. Budget $439.6M. Contract completion Apr 30, 2023 (revised). NTP Oct 31, 2018.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Harmon Shop Replacement Phase V Stage 2

warnings: project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: LIRR Expansion - Grade Crossing Eliminations
tool_args.raw_text: In February, MTA C&D closed the Main Street railroad crossing in Mineola, the final railroad crossing to be permanently eliminated as part of the LIRR Expansion Project.

payload.description: Eliminated eight railroad crossings as part of the LIRR Expansion Project since 2019, enhancing safety and service reliability. Final crossing at Main Street in Mineola being rebuilt as pedestrian overpass with elevators, to open spring 2021.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Highlight: LIRR Expansion – Grade Crossing Eliminations

tool_args.label: New Substations on the Canarsie L Line - Maspeth & Harrison
tool_args.raw_text: MTA C&D is nearing completion on two brand-new underground substations on the Canarsie L Line.

payload.project_name: New Substations on the Canarsie L Line at Maspeth & Harrison
payload.description: Two new underground substations on the Canarsie L Line to increase traction-power capacity and maximize CBTC benefits. Maspeth Substation awarded as Design-Bid-Build, Harrison Substation as Design-Build. Both to be placed into service in May 2021.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Highlight: New Substations on the Canarsie L Line at Maspeth & Harrison

warnings: project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: ADA at Court Square Station
tool_args.raw_text: The Manhattan-bound side of the Court Sq-23 St (E-M) subway station in Long Island City, Queens, is now ADA accessible.

payload.description: Manhattan-bound side of Court Sq-23 St (E-M) station now ADA accessible. New elevator, ramp, widened staircase completed through MTA C&D's Transit-Oriented Development Program and External Partner Program. Plans underway to make Queens-bound platform ADA accessible under 2020-2024 Capital Plan.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Highlight: ADA at Court Square Station

tool_args.label: 207th Street Sewer Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: 207th Street Yard sustain extensive water damage during Super Storm Sandy from the brackish water from the Harlem River.

payload.description: Relocate NYC owned sewers from inside 207th Street Yard to outside. Remove and relocate existing DEP regulator, diversion chamber, tide gates. Install reinforced sewer lines and back-water valves. Budget $152.4M. NTP Dec 27, 2019. Substantial completion Feb 2024.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207th Street Sewer Replacement
